rationale: Top-of-form name field — the consenting Maine nonprofit corporation's current name. Domestic Maine entity; uses entity.name per the entity-name-vs-home-jurisdiction convention.

label_verbatim: FIRST: ...consents to the use of the following indistinguishable name: ___ (line 1, full-width)
rationale: FIRST line 1: the indistinguishable name itself — the name that the requestor wants to use, which is too similar to the consenting corporation's current entity.name.

label_verbatim: FIRST: to ___ (requestor of indistinguishable name) (line 2, full-width)
rationale: FIRST line 2: the requestor entity — the entity that will use the indistinguishable name once consent is granted. Captioned '(requestor of indistinguishable name)'.

label_verbatim: THIRD: The entity in possession of the name must change its name to:* ___
rationale: THIRD: the consenting corporation's new name — the distinguishable name it will adopt to free up the indistinguishable name for the requestor. * footnote: 'This application must be accompanied by the applicable form to change its name as provided in Item Third.'

label_verbatim: FOURTH: The address of the registered office of the corporation allowing indistinguishable name in the State of Maine is ___ (street, city, state and zip code)
rationale: FOURTH: Maine registered office of the consenting corporation. Maps to the existing registered_agent.physical_address namespace per convention.
Date of execution (narrow widget on the left of the signature row).

label_verbatim: *By ___ (signature) / ___ (type or print name and capacity) — first signer
rationale: First *By signer's printed name and capacity (Shape D combined). Right side, upper position. The signature line above is decorative — the AcroForm widget is on the printed-name line.

label_verbatim: *By ___ (signature) / ___ (type or print name and capacity) — second signer
rationale: Second *By signer's printed name and capacity (Shape D combined). Right side, lower position. Form footnote 'MUST be signed by any duly authorized officer' (singular) — second slot optional.

widget_id: Name of entitys on the submitted filings 2

label_verbatim: Hold attested copy for pick up

widget_id: Contact email address for this filing
Email address to use for annual report reminders
